meta.project: Mobile UX/UI Optimization and TestSprite Inspection

product_overview: A mobile-first audit and set of improvements for the frontend to resolve layout, touch-target, and interaction issues across the landing, community, chat, fortune, and profile areas; validated with TestSprite automated checks and manual review.
core_goals: Eliminate horizontal scrolling and layout overflow on narrow viewports
Ensure touch targets, spacing, and typography meet mobile usability standards
Make modals and long content scrollable on small screens without clipping
Stabilize chat interactions and reduce loss of conversation context where possible
Preserve core, non-paid user journeys (community browsing, MBTI & Saju analysis, daily fortune, profile/usage) on mobile

features.name: MBTI & Saju Analysis
features.description: Authenticated users submit birth date and MBTI information to receive a combined personality and Saju destiny analysis from the landing flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Authenticate -> Fill birth date and MBTI info -> Submit analysis -> View analyzed results
Navigate to / -> Authenticate -> Fill incomplete or invalid birth date -> Submit analysis -> See validation error and guidance

features.name: Community Interaction
features.description: Browse, search, filter, and interact with community posts; creation may require authentication while browsing and reading are available without login.
user_flows: Navigate to /community -> Scroll through post list -> Use search to filter posts -> Click a tag to filter by topic -> Like a post -> View like acknowledged
Navigate to /community -> Attempt to create a new post -> Receive authentication required prompt or guidance to sign in

features.name: Deep Counseling Chat
features.description: Authenticated, AI-driven conversational counseling for personalized guidance; supports real-time AI responses and multi-turn interactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Authenticate -> Select a counseling theme -> Type a message -> Receive AI response in real-time -> Continue conversation
Navigate to /chat -> Authenticate -> Select a counseling theme -> Type a message -> See message send failure or service error (e.g., network or AI service unavailable)

features.name: Daily Fortune & Service Portal
features.description: Unauthenticated users can request and view daily fortune cards and related service summaries on the fortune page.
user_flows: Navigate to /fortune -> Request today's fortune -> View daily fortune card and details
Navigate to /fortune -> Request today's fortune -> See service unavailable or layout/content overflow making result unreadable on mobile

features.name: Profile & Usage (MyPage)
features.description: Authenticated users view their profile summary and credit/usage history to track past analysis and activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /mypage -> Authenticate -> View profile summary -> View usage history entries
Navigate to /mypage -> Authenticate -> See loading error or empty history message indicating data unavailable

routes.description: Main landing page with hero and feature grids
User profile and usage history dashboard

features.name: MBTI & Saju Analysis
features.description: Comprehensive personality analysis combining MBTI and Saju
user_interactions: Fill birth date and MBTI info

features.name: Deep Counseling Chat
features.description: Interactive AI chat for personalized life counseling
user_interactions: Type messages in the chat input

features.name: Credit Management
user_interactions: Complete payment flow via Toss Payments

known_limitations.issue: Chat history is not persistent across sessions for all tiers
known_limitations.impact: Users might lose chat context upon refresh if not saved to Supabase
